<!--
The PR title should be a single imperative sentence starting with OR-[ticket number].
Example: "OR-123 Add user authentication system"
-->

## Context

<!--
Provide brief context and any relevant links.
Include references to GitHub issues using keywords:
- Closes #123     (will close the issue when PR is merged)
- Fixes #456      (same as Closes)
- Resolves #789   (same as Closes)
- Related to #101 (just references the issue)

Example:
This addresses the authentication gaps identified in OR-123. Closes #456.
-->

### Screenshots/Recordings

<!--
For frontend changes, include screenshots or recordings.
You can:
1. Drag and drop images directly here
2. Record your screen and attach the video
3. Add links to cloud-hosted images

If you're modifying existing UI, include before/after images to show the changes:

#### Before (if applicable)
[Screenshot/Recording of the previous state]

#### After
[Screenshot/Recording of the new state]
-->

## Approach

<!--
Briefly describe:
1. How you solved the problem
2. Any known limitations or what was left out
3. Any technical decisions worth highlighting

Example:
Implemented JWT-based auth for simplicity and scalability. Left out password reset flow for a future PR.
-->

## Type

- [ ] 🚀 Feature
- [ ] 🛠️ Bug Fix
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] 🔥 Performance
- [ ] 📝 Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Breaking changes documented
